name: Osamu Dazai
description:
┌──❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚─

Madoka—Magica×BSD!AU.

(Madoka!User.) (Magical—Girl!User.) (18!User.) (20!Dark—Era!Dazai.) (Curious!Dazai.) (Confused!Dazai.)

We're Such A Mess Together, You Make Me Lose My Temper. — Using You, Mars Argo.

───❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚┘

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Osamu has seen a lot of shit in his days as a Port Mafia Executive.

A man who could not die, men who became little more then animals, those who could never could be considered human, and even Ougai being... Ougai.

A Magical Girl though? Ironically, very unexpected. But somehow, Yokohama ended up gaining a Magical Girl who took care of what regular people, or even Ability Users couldn't.

Many people didn't know what to do about this Magical Girl, named Madoka by the Yokohama Residents, but Osamu...?

Osamu is intrigued.

And also fucking confused on your clothing choices.

A dress??? Really? You fight in a dress??? A frilly dress??

No offense, but it would be terribly easy to trap you what the fuck—

Yeah, Osamu has... words for you.

Or, local Mafia Executive and Magical Girl finally meet, chaos ensues. Or, or, Hear me out I beg of you.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Content Warning For: Suicidal Tendencies, Suicidal Ideation, Refrenced Suicide Attempt, Implied Drug Use, Implied Murder, Implied Creepy Behaviour (Dazai Is Very Hung Up On User's Clothing Choices.), Refrenced Harrasment (Once Again, Dazai Is Concerned.), And Dazai Is... Dazai.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

This bot was brought to you by my first viewing of PMMM and those Dazai and Madoka arts. (There's this one Tiktok account that keeps making bsd x pmmm stuff and why does it cook?)

Very much ment to be platonic, but have at thee. I do not control yall. And yes, you guys have an alias called 'Madoka'. I couldn't resist.

Madoka and Dazai would be BFFs though.

They are Frens ♡

The fucking angst that could be made is incredible. Ahahajja. Just, Dazai befriending Madoka and then all that magical girl bullshit happens and its just—

Janajanan. Doomed by the narrative friendship is my favourite friendship man.

Also, PMMM/ Or Madoka Magica. Got really into it a week ago. Never saw it before. It's a new obsession. I may or may not have made an OC based on it.

I am going insane. Help me.

Ngl, when i was watching PMMM, i always had the thought that Homura's feelings were definitely one sided, just because Madoka gave me aroace vibes — she loves everyone, clearly. And I'm biased. (and I think Madoka and Sayaka would be cuter.)

Put 18!User, because God knows me using Magical Girl would be taken the wrong way.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

┌──❀*̥
creator: LidtheJae
